heading: This Afternoon
text: Rain continuing, except diminishing to showers in the St. Lawrence Valley. Highs from the upper 40s to mid 50s north, mid 50s to lower 60s in the south, with some mid 60s in far southern New Hampshire. North winds 5 to 10 mph from Route 4 northward, elsewhere from the south at 5 to 10 mph, and gusting to 20 mph in far southern New Hampshire.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly to partly cloudy. Chance of early showers in the St. Lawrence Valley, otherwise likely, before diminishing from west to east by midnight. Patchy fog. Lows from the mid 30s to around 40; some lower 30s in the Adirondacks. Winds becoming variable to west around 5 mph.

heading: Thursday
text: Partly to mostly cloudy from the Adirondacks and Route 2 northward, partly cloudy to the south. Chance of a shower, mainly near the Vermont/Québec border. Highs from the mid 50s to around 60, except low to mid 60s in southeastern valleys, and low to mid 50s far north. West winds 5 to 10 mph.
